name: vision_inspector
description: Cascaded offline AOI: PatchCore anomaly detector first, then a local Qwen2-VL-2B-Instruct model for adjudication. The VLM is post-trained via dpo_finetune.py to emit a strict one-line format (DEFECT: <label> | CONFIDENCE: <0-1> | LOCATION: <comp>_PIN<n>). Supply adapter_path to load a LoRA adapter on top of the frozen base VLM. If the VLM stage is requested but unavailable, the plugin returns an explicit failure instead of substituting another engine.
self_test: python -c "from plugins.prometheus.vision_inspector.wrapper import PLUGIN; import asyncio; r=asyncio.run(PLUGIN.invoke({'mode':'self_test'})); assert r.get('valid', True)"

image_path.description: Path to the image to inspect.

reference_dir.description: Directory of good reference images for PatchCore training.

prompt.description: Custom prompt for the VLM adjudication stage.

anomaly_threshold.description: Anomaly score threshold (0-1) for triggering VLM cascade (default 0.5).

vlm_model.description: VLM model ID (default 'Qwen/Qwen2-VL-2B-Instruct'). Qwen2.5-VL-* IDs also supported.

adapter_path.description: Optional filesystem path to a LoRA adapter produced by dpo_finetune.py. When set, the adapter is loaded on top of frozen base VLM weights. Omit for zero-shot inference.

skip_vlm.description: If true, run PatchCore only without VLM adjudication.
